items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic By The Way Mini Boston Bag, brown FF jacquard fabric material, featuring beige leather FENDI ROMA lettering. Hard tortoiseshell-effect organic glass handle. Zipper closure. Lined interior with pockets and gold metal hardware. This bag comes with a handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody! Model: FD8067, Size: 20.5*9*12cm.

items.name_en: 👄FENDI New imported leather clutch, zip closure, featuring gold metal Fendi Roma lettering. Suede fabric lining, gold and silver mixed-finish metal hardware. Model: FD8068, Dimensions: 32*5*11cm

items.name_en: 👄L New messenger bag👉11360,🎺 Featuring imported pebbled calfskin paired with a soft back leather, adjustable cotton webbing shoulder strap, comfort is greatly increased👍 As a perfect interpretation of the classic messenger bag, it offers functionality while maintaining a minimalist and elegant masculine silhouette. Fold-over top flap closure with double buckle fastening. Novel compact volume, suitable for smart practical style. Main features: Made of soft textured calfskin, webbing shoulder strap, herringbone cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, four rows of patchwork silhouette leather flaps, dimensions: 33*25*10.3cm

items.name_en: 👍👍 25CM Pillow Bag M41113 Taiwan vintage pattern with original bronze hardware🎁🎁Speedy 25 is a perfect city bag. The iconic shape with classic Monogram canvas, multiple carrying methods, and luxurious natural cowhide trim add a fashionable and avant-garde touch✈️✈️Shiny gold metal hardware and lock- Adjustable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, crossbody, or shoulder- Natural cowhide round handle and trim- Lockable double zipper closure- Interior pocket- D-ring for hanging keys and accessories- Soft fabric lining⭐️Dimensions: 25-19-15CM

items.name_en: 👏👏YSL Saint Laurent = Another hot new release🔥. This cross-stitch style has been incredibly popular lately. This veteran designer couldn't miss it. The strings look like mysterious warriors guarding their owners—loyal and aloof. Top-grain calfskin with caviar texture, vacuum IP plating, high recognition. You know it's SLP from afar. 30X20X8cm, Model=26808

items.name_en: 👏New Fabric Crossbody Bag👏1BC073/Large Tote Bag
items.name_cn:
👏New Fabric Crossbody Bag👏1BC073/Large Tote Bag
This leather mini shoulder bag features a minimalist design. The front metal triangle logo adds a signature touch. Equipped with a removable/adjustable logo-printed fabric strap, it looks very beautiful on 😘😘 showcasing a modern style. High-end fashion, a staple for daily outfits. Grab yours now, it's so beautiful 👏👏
30L x 28H x 12W cm 👏👏👏
